definition: Current HY OAS of 350-420bp is unambiguously below historical stress thresholds, sitting at the 40th-55th percentile historically and below the minimum threshold for equity stress in every historical analogue. Any shift toward the 450-600bp zone would be significant.
evidence: Below minimum threshold for equity stress in every historical analogue
Consensus across all 8 agents — no agent disputes this
open_questions: When and what will trigger movement toward the 450-600bp zone?
Is current tightness a Minsky speculative-phase signal or rational pricing of the fiscal buffer?
